form.formComment: Last run finished fifth of 10 runners at Kempton Park on March 23 over 3200m, 15 len behind Loustic Du Chatel with 72.5kg at $9. form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last start finished second of 12 starters at this track on March 23 over 3000m, 3 len behind Stanners Glen with 72.5kg at $2.60. Strips fitter and is again a top chance.

form.formComment: Having third race start. First race start came from midfield; finished tenth of 11 runners at Taunton on November 27 over 3300m, 68 len behind Canty's Cove with 71kg at $6. Might be out of his depth.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Freshened for 38 days. First-up after five months finished seventh of 13 starters at this track on March 5 over 3000m, 28 len behind Indannya with 70kg at $29. Previously second-up finished third of 9 runners at Newcastle All Weather on October 9 over 2500m, a neck behind Moon Sniper with 64kg at $3.30. That run came after a switch to the H Fry yard.
